mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO metric_slow_sql_sample (instance_id, thread_id, event_id, conn_user, conn_host, schema_name, digest, sql_text, exec_time_us, lock_time_us, rows_examined, rows_sent, sort_rows, no_index_used, tmp_tables, tmp_disk_tables, collect_time) VALUES
(#{instanceId}, #{it.threadId}, #{it.eventId}, #{it.connUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.connHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.schemaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.digest,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.sqlText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.execTimeUs}, #{it.lockTimeUs}, #{it.rowsExamined}, #{it.rowsSent}, #{it.sortRows}, #{it.noIndexUsed}, #{it.tmpTables}, #{it.tmpDiskTables}, to_timestamp(#{it.timestampMillis} / 1000.0))
